title: Construction Manager
description:
Job Responsibilities:

  • Independently manage construction activities and progress to meet project timelines and goals.
  • Interpret electrical drawings, specifications, and project requirements.
  • Plan and organise site setup, develop sequential job plans, and ensure cost, quality, and customer satisfaction objectives are met.
  • Handle resource planning for site staff, subcontractors, and materials.
  • Attend internal coordination, kick-off, toolbox, pre-start, and progress meetings.
  • Supervise and monitor the performance of site teams and subcontractors to ensure high-quality work.
  • Manage materials, tools, and equipment, including procurement and usage.
  • Resolve drawing discrepancies with consultants before execution.
  • Coordinate schedules for staff and subcontractors to align with project timelines.
  • Review construction plans (site utilisation, hoisting, temporary utilities/offices).
  • Ensure effective quality control through inspections and pre-handover checks.
  • Verify the use of approved and compliant materials.
  • Enforce safety compliance with local regulations and company policies.
  • Liaise with clients, consultants, and authorities to address construction matters.
  • Maintain and submit all required project documentation accurately.
  • Identify project risks and implement preventive solutions.
  • Lead and motivate site teams for smooth project delivery.
  • Prepare and monitor project budgets to control costs.
  • Perform all duties following CCCC policies, procedures, and systems.

Job Requirement:

  • Bachelor’s degree or above in Civil Engineering, Construction Management, Architecture, or a related field.
  • Proven experience in project management, preferably in residence building development or commercial building in Singapore
  • Strong knowledge of building codes and regulatory requirements
  • Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
  • Proficiency in project management software and tools.
  • Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced, dynamic environment and manage multiple projects simultaneously.
  • Strong leadership skills with a focus on teamwork, collaboration, and problem-solving.

postedCompany.description:
China Communications Construction Company Ltd. is a world leading super large infrastructure service provider, ranked 93th among Fortune Global 500 in 2019. As China's largest international contractor, we ranked the third among ENR’s Top250 International Contractors and the first among Chinese enterprises listed for 13 consecutive years.


We are mainly engaged in infrastructure investment, construction and operation, equipment manufacturing, real estate and urban development, etc., and offer clients package solutions and integrated services such as investment, financing, consultation, planning, design, construction, management and operation.
postedCompany.name: CHINA COMMUNICATIONS CONSTRUCTION COMPANY LIMITED (Singapore Branch)

districts.location: D16 Upper East Coast, Bedok, Eastwood, Kew Drive
